overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a continuous walk from a dimly lit abandoned indoor transit station with graffiti and neon signs, through a covered market area with parked vehicles, transitioning to a bright outdoor futuristic city street with holographic building facades and moderate traffic. The journey progresses from enclosed industrial interiors to an open cyberpunk urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered corridor in abandoned transit station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dim corridor with V graffiti and neon signs, approaching a red-lit area ahead

entered.detail: large wall with red V logo and skull decoration, graffiti text reading 'GET'
stacked wooden crates and barrels with blue cushion on top
blue neon sign for ramen shop in the distance
large structural concrete column supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit indoor corridor of an abandoned transit station. The camera moves forward past a prominent wall featuring a red 'V' graffiti logo and skull decoration, with wooden barrels and a blue cushion resting nearby. A distant blue neon ramen sign glows in the background, while the concrete pillar on the right emphasizes the industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market hall with parked vehicles and food stalls

events.description: exits narrow corridor into wider covered market area with high ceiling

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered market, passing a red van on the right and approaching a black car ahead

entered.detail: red commercial van parked along the right wall, partially illuminated by red neon
illuminated food service counter with digital menu displays
vertical red banners suspended from the ceiling depicting figures
classic black muscle car parked in the center aisle
large planters with greenery placed near the van

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider covered market hall with a high industrial ceiling. The camera moves past a red delivery van bathed in red neon light on the right, while food stalls line the left. A black muscle car sits parked in the center aisle ahead, and red banners hang from the ceiling. The environment shifts from the narrow corridor to this spacious indoor parking area.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor with toll barriers leading to outdoor

events.description: bright natural light becomes visible at the end of the corridor indicating outdoor exit
approaching the exit gate with speed limit sign, transitioning from indoor to outdoor space

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright exit of the covered structure, passing through toll barriers

entered.detail: white commercial van parked near the exit barriers
digital speed limit sign displaying '40' mounted above the exit
automated toll gate with red and white barriers and sensor equipment
stacked cardboard boxes and crates blocking part of the pathway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the final stretch of the covered area toward a bright exit. A white van is parked to the left near toll gate barriers, while a digital speed limit sign hangs overhead. Cardboard boxes are stacked in the center of the path. The lighting shifts dramatically as bright daylight streams in from the outdoor plaza ahead, signaling the transition from the enclosed market to the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic building facade

events.description: exits covered structure into open cyberpunk city street with massive holographic displays
futuristic cars drive past on the multi-lane road as camera approaches crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stepping out into the futuristic city plaza, walking across the crosswalk while observing the holographic building and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road, passing from right to left

entered.detail: massive curved building covered in rainbow-colored holographic digital banners and advertisements
raised concrete planter with palm trees and greenery in the center of the plaza
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a vast futuristic city plaza dominated by a massive curved building wrapped in vibrant rainbow holographic displays. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights and gray overcast sky. The camera crosses a striped crosswalk, passing palm tree planters in the center island, while futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road. The scene transitions from the confined indoor spaces to this open, bustling cyberpunk urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit transit corridor into a spacious, neon-drenched industrial market hall. It begins by gliding through a narrow indoor passage, passing a red 'V' graffiti logo and skull decoration beside wooden barrels under the distant glow of a blue ramen sign. As the camera moves forward, the tight concrete architecture gives way to a wider covered hall with a high industrial ceiling and hanging red banners. The scene then expands into a parking area, moving past a red delivery van bathed in crimson light and food stalls before approaching a black muscle car parked in the center aisle.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit covered transit area into a vast, vibrant futuristic city plaza. It begins by moving through the final stretch of the enclosed space, passing a parked white van and stacked cardboard boxes beneath a digital speed limit sign. As the camera approaches the exit, the lighting shifts dramatically as bright daylight streams in, signaling the transition from the industrial interior to the open city. The scene then expands as the camera emerges into the plaza, crossing a striped crosswalk and passing palm tree planters while futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a massive curved building wrapped in rainbow holographic displays, its neon lights reflecting off the wet asphalt under a gray overcast sky.
